context: Tests whether the skill corrects stale App Store Accessibility Nutrition Label categories and grounds claim guidance in common-task evidence rather than marketing intent.

checklist.name: Current categories
checklist.description: Lists the current categories as VoiceOver, Voice Control, Larger Text, Dark Interface, Differentiate Without Color Alone, Sufficient Contrast, Reduced Motion, Captions, and Audio Descriptions.

checklist.name: Switch boundary
checklist.description: States that Switch Control is important accessibility work but is not a current App Store Accessibility Nutrition Label category.

checklist.name: Keyboard boundary
checklist.description: States that Full Keyboard Access is important accessibility work but is not a current App Store Accessibility Nutrition Label category.

checklist.name: Captions rename
checklist.description: Maps Closed Captions / SDH to the current Captions label.

checklist.name: Contrast rename
checklist.description: Maps Increase Contrast evidence to the current Sufficient Contrast label rather than naming Increase Contrast as the label.

checklist.name: Common tasks
checklist.description: Says labels should be claimed only when users can complete all common tasks with that feature on the relevant device.

checklist.name: Task matrix
checklist.description: Recommends building a common-task test matrix before answering in App Store Connect.

checklist.name: Media evidence
checklist.description: Calls for caption, transcript, and audio-description evidence for media content rather than only player UI support.

checklist.name: Visual labels
checklist.description: Includes evidence for Larger Text, Dark Interface, Differentiate Without Color Alone, Sufficient Contrast, and Reduced Motion.

checklist.name: Accuracy warning
checklist.description: Warns that App Store accessibility answers must stay accurate and should not be treated as marketing claims.
